en_title: Fallout: New Vegas Director Says Amazon's Fallout Show Is 'One of the Best Adaptations of a Video Game Franchise' — and No, He Isn't Bothered by Dinky Facing the Wrong Way
cn_title: 《辐射：新维加斯》导演盛赞剧集：最佳改编之一，不纠结恐龙朝向
subtitle: 转个身怎么了？
opus_summary: 《辐射：新维加斯》导演Josh Sawyer大赞亚马逊《辐射》剧集，称为最佳游戏改编之一，并坦言对恐龙雕像Dinky朝向错误不介意。他透露第二季布景极近游戏，第三季或赴科罗拉多，拓展《辐射》正典。

paragraphs.en: Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer has given Amazon’s Fallout show the thumbs up, saying it’s one of the best video game adaptations ever seen on film or television.
paragraphs.cn: 《辐射：新维加斯》导演 Josh Sawyer 对亚马逊的《辐射》剧集竖起大拇指，称其为有史以来最出色的游戏改编影视作品之一。

paragraphs.en: Fallout Season 2 is set in New Vegas, which was the setting and title of Obsidian’s much-loved 2010 entry, Fallout: New Vegas. Sawyer was director and designer on that game, so he’s a great person to ask about Amazon’s adaptation. And that’s exactly what The 41st Precinct did in a new video interview about Sawyer’s career.
paragraphs.cn: 《辐射》第二季背景设定在新维加斯，正是 Obsidian 2010 年那部备受喜爱的《辐射：新维加斯》的故事发生地和标题。Sawyer 当时担任该游戏的导演兼设计师，因此他对亚马逊的改编剧集很有发言权。而《The 41st Precinct》在最新一期关于 Sawyer 职业生涯的视频采访中，恰好就向他提出了这个问题。

paragraphs.en: Responding, Sawyer was very enthusiastic, even though he has a few criticisms that he’s not even sure he would classify as actual criticisms.
paragraphs.cn: Sawyer 在回应中显得非常热情，尽管他也提了几点意见——不过他自己都不确定那算不算真正的批评。

paragraphs.en: “I think it's an amazing adaptation,” Sawyer began. “Like, honestly. I know that the bar is not always very high for TV or film adaptations of video games, but I think it's one of the best that I've seen, certainly.
paragraphs.cn: 「我觉得这是一部了不起的改编作品，」Sawyer 开场说道，「真的，说实在的。我知道电子游戏改编影视剧的水准常常不太高，但这绝对是我看过的最好的之一。」

paragraphs.en: “I guess I would say that there are sort of critiques or like personal things where I would say, ‘I don't know if I would have taken the plot in that direction,’ or, ‘I don't know if I would have done that with that character,’ but that's like, any writer is going to look at something and be like, ‘I don't know if I'd do that.’ I don't think they're like real criticisms.
paragraphs.cn: 「我会说大概有那么一些挑剔的地方，或者说个人看法，比如‘我不知道我会不会把剧情往那个方向带’，或者‘我不知道我会不会那样处理那个角色’，但这就像，任何编剧看到别人的作品都会想‘我不知道我会不会那么做’。我觉得那些不算是真正的批评。」

paragraphs.en: “As far as how Mr. House was handled — I didn't write Mr. House. I didn't create Mr. House. That was [lead writer] John Gonzalez to be clear — I love Justin Theroux and I just love him in everything, and I think he was a great Mr. House, personally. I am very interested to see where it goes.”
paragraphs.cn: 「至于豪斯先生的处理方式——先说明一下，豪斯先生不是我写的，也不是我创造的，那是首席编剧 John Gonzalez 的作品——我很喜欢 Justin Theroux，他演什么我都爱，我个人觉得他饰的豪斯先生很棒。我特别好奇后续会怎样发展。」

paragraphs.en: Sawyer went on to touch on complaints some Fallout fans had with the accuracy of the show as it relates to the video games, although he insisted Amazon did a great job of it.
paragraphs.cn: Sawyer接着谈及部分《辐射》玩家质疑剧集在还原游戏方面的准确性，但他坚称亚马逊做得很到位。

paragraphs.en: “I did get a chance to actually see the set in Season 2,” he revealed. “I got to see the vault and I got to see Freeside [a district of New Vegas in the Mojave Wasteland]. They look like the game. They look really, really close. I mean, the layout is not exactly the same. The same thing with Novac.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我有机会实地探班第二季的拍摄现场。」Sawyer透露，「我看到了避难所，也看到了Freeside（莫哈韦废土上新维加斯的一个区），它们看起来就和游戏里一样。还原度真的非常非常高。我的意思是，内部格局并不完全一致，Novac也一样。」

paragraphs.en: At that point, Sawyer brought up complaints from some fans about the Dinky the T-Rex statue in the town of Novac. In Fallout: New Vegas, Dinky faces away from the town to act as a sniper perch. In the Fallout show, however, Amazon had it rotated 180 degrees to face towards the motel. While this change was made so protagonist Lucy could appear as a sniper and shoot enemies outside the motel in Season 2, Episode 1, some Fallout fans didn’t like that Dinky was, as they put it, facing the wrong way.
paragraphs.cn: 说到这里，Sawyer提到了部分玩家对Novac镇那只名为Dinky的恐龙雕像提出的不满。在《辐射：新维加斯》里，Dinky背对小镇，充当狙击制高点。而在《辐射》剧集中，亚马逊把它旋转了180度，让雕像面朝汽车旅馆。这一改动是为了让第二季第一集中的女主角露西能以狙击手身份出场，朝旅馆外的敌人射击，但一些《辐射》玩家并不满意Dinky——用他们的话说——面朝了错误的方向。

paragraphs.en: Sawyer, though, understood the change and said he wasn’t bothered by it, although he admitted he might have incurred the wrath of Fallout fans for saying so.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Sawyer理解这种改动，并表示自己并不为此困扰，尽管他承认这番表态可能会招来《辐射》玩家的怒火。

paragraphs.en: “I remember people were really upset that Dinky has turned around, and I'm like, personally… I get why people get upset about that, but also the scene wouldn't work at all because it's about Lucy firing into the thing or whatever.
paragraphs.cn: 「我记得有人对Dinky转了方向非常不满，但我个人……我理解大家为什么会为此生气，可如果不这样改，那个场景就完全没法成立，因为它本身就是露西朝着那个方向射击之类的。」

paragraphs.en: “So I understand why they did it. I wasn't personally really bent out of shape about it. Maybe people will say I'm a traitor to Fallout now or something! I thought it was a good representation of a lot of the iconic stuff that you see in it. I am very interested in where it's going to go. I think it's probably one of the best adaptations of a video game franchise I've seen to TV or film. And I’m looking forward to the next season."
paragraphs.cn: 「所以我理解他们为什么这么做。我个人并没有太纠结于此。也许现在会有人说我是《辐射》的叛徒之类了吧！我觉得剧集很好地呈现了原作中众多标志性的内容。我很想知道故事会如何发展。在我看来，它可能是我见过最出色的电子游戏改编影视作品之一。期待下一季。」

paragraphs.en: “What's interesting though is the plot is like, yes, New Vegas was there, but it wasn't about the plot of New Vegas," Sawyer continued, as thoughts turn to Season 3. "It's their own plot that they're charting. Location-wise, I don't know, but it's clear that they have their own specific story that they're telling through all of these areas.”
paragraphs.cn: 「但有趣的是剧情走向，」Sawyer在话题转向第三季时继续说道，「没错，新维加斯确实出现了，但故事并非围绕《新维加斯》的剧情展开。他们在规划自己的故事线。地点上我不太确定，但很明显他们在所有这些地方讲述着自己独有的故事。」

paragraphs.en: Warning! Spoilers for Fallout Season 2 finale follow…
paragraphs.cn: 警告！以下涉及《辐射》第二季结局剧透……

paragraphs.en: Interestingly, the ending of Fallout Season 2 sets up Colorado as the location for Season 3, with The Ghoul, played by Walton Goggins, already on his way. The snowy peaks of post-apocalyptic Colorado have yet to be explored by the mainline Fallout video games, but , codenamed “Van Buren,” which Sawyer worked on as lead technical designer back at Black Isle Studios.
paragraphs.cn: 有趣的是，《辐射》第二季结局将第三季的故事地点设在了科罗拉多，由沃尔顿·戈金斯饰演的尸鬼已经踏上前往那里的路途。正传《辐射》游戏尚未涉足后末日科罗拉多的雪峰，但被取消的《辐射3》项目代号「Van Buren」曾对此有所涉及，Sawyer当时在黑岛工作室担任其首席技术设计师。

paragraphs.en: As a result, everything Season 3 brings to the table will feel brand new to Fallout fans , and we can expect a significant expansion of the Fallout canon. The Fallout TV show is set after all the games, but are within the Fallout timeline and are canon. So everything we see in the show continues the overarching Fallout storyline.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，第三季呈现的一切对《辐射》粉丝而言都将是全新的体验，并且我们可以期待《辐射》正典的一次重大扩展。《辐射》剧集的时间设定在所有游戏之后，但它处于《辐射》时间线之内且属于正典。所以我们在剧中看到的一切都在延续整个《辐射》故事线。

paragraphs.en: Bethesda chief Todd Howard recently said pre-production was underway on Season 3, which starts shooting this month in Los Angeles. Amazon has announced a number of actors joining the cast for Season 3 , including Manny Jacinto from Star Wars show The Acolyte, Thomasin McKenzie from Jojo Rabbit, Emily Mortimer from The Newsroom, and . Howard has described Paul as “a Fallout fan from way back.”
paragraphs.cn: 贝塞斯达负责人陶德·霍华德近期透露，第三季前期制作已在进行，本月将在洛杉矶开拍。亚马逊宣布了多位加入第三季的演员，包括来自《星球大战》剧集《侍僧》的Manny Jacinto、《乔乔的异想世界》的Thomasin McKenzie、《新闻编辑室》的Emily Mortimer，以及Aaron Paul。霍华德称Paul是「资深《辐射》粉丝」。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.

manual_approved_issues.detail: source contains 'Bethesda', but required dictionary translation 'B社/贝塞斯达' is missing
